zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Thornton於1444年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Roger Thornton24歲，母親Elizabeth Greystoke29歲。她和John Edward Carter至少有3個女兒。她去世於1468年在英國享年24歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆切斯特 勒 史崔特。

zh-hans.Ludworth, Durham, England: 英国英格兰達勒姆盧德沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Thornton于1444年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Roger Thornton24岁，母亲Elizabeth Greystoke29岁。她和John Edward Carter至少有3个女儿。她去世于1468年在英国享年24岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆切斯特 勒 史崔特。

nameMeanings.name: Thornton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England and Scotland so called, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The placename is most frequent in northern England, especially Yorkshire, where there are at least 16 possible sources for the surname.
Irish: Anglicized (translated) form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin ‘son of Sceachán’ (see Skehan ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Draighneáin ‘descendant of Draighneán’ (see Drennan ).

variants.name: Thornber
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the five minor places in Yorkshire called Thornber, particularly Thornber in Halton West. The placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + beorg ‘hill, mound’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thorton
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Thornton  , or a habitational name from Thorton in Marnhull, Dorset, which has the same origin.

variants.name: Skehan
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin or Ó Sceacháin ‘son (or descendant) of Sceachán’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of sceach ‘briar, thorn bush’. The Gaelic name has sometimes been ‘translated’ as Thornton .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Thornton was born in 1444, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Roger Thornton, was 24 and her mother, Elizabeth Greystoke, was 29. She had at least 3 daughters with John Edward Carter. She died in 1468, in England, at the age of 24, and was buried in Chester le Street, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Thornton est née en 1444, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Roger Thornton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Greystoke, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec John Edward Carter. Elle est décédée en 1468, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterrée à Chester le Street, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Thornton 1444 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Thornton 24 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Greystoke 29. Sie hatte mit John Edward Carter mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1468 im Alter von 24 Jahren in England und wurde in Chester le Street, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Thornton è nata il nel 1444 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Roger Thornton, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Greystoke, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con John Edward Carter. Morì nel 1468, nel England, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolta a Chester le Street, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Thorntonが1444年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger Thorntonは24歳，母Elizabeth Greystokeは29歳であった。彼女はJohn Edward Carterとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1468年にイギリスで24歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムチェスター ル ストレエトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Thornton(이)가 1444년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Thornton(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Greystoke(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 John Edward Carter(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 영국에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 체스터 일 스트릿에 묻혔다.

mn.Ludworth, Durham, England: Ludworth, Durham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Thornton nasceu em 1444, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Thornton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Greystoke, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhas com John Edward Carter. Ela faleceu em 1468, em Inglaterra, com 24 anos, e foi sepultada em Chester le Street, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Thornton родилась в 1444 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Thornton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Greystoke, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от John Edward Carter. Она умерла в 1468 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 24 лет и была похоронена в местности честир л стрит, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Thornton nació en 1444, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Thornton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Greystoke, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con John Edward Carter. Murió en 1468, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 24 años, y fue sepultada en Chester le Street, Durham, Inglaterra.
